# PbOS x86-64 HAL

Here is the x86-64 HAL of the PbOS.

## Known Issues

### Strange General Protection Fault When Scheduling in QEMU

Occasionally we found that the kernel triggers a suspicious general protection fault during the scheduling of massive processes, fix it.

Here is a log file:

```text
Servicing hardware INT=0x30
   487: v=30 e=0000 i=0 cpl=0 IP=0008:ffffffff8004fe2c pc=ffffffff8004fe2c SP=0000:ffffc00000a45fd8 env->regs[R_EAX]=0000000000402000
```

We didn't verify if it is solved so it will be kept here until nobody reports this anymore.
